description_long: This is a modern, two-seater sofa with a sleek, boxy silhouette and clean lines, upholstered in a dark, likely black, material that appears smooth and subtly reflective. The sofa features two large, uniform seat cushions and two matching backrest cushions, all of which are attached and seamlessly integrated into the frame. The armrests are straight, broad, and padded, rising to the same height as the backrest, giving the sofa a balanced and symmetrical appearance. The legs are short, cylindrical, and positioned at the corners, slightly recessed, and likely made of wood or metal with a dark finish. The upholstery is solid in color with no visible patterns or decorative stitching, contributing to a minimalist and contemporary aesthetic. This sofa would be suitable for urban environments such as public waiting areas, lobbies, or outdoor covered spaces.
description: A modern, boxy two-seater sofa with smooth, dark upholstery, straight padded armrests, and short, recessed legs. The design is minimalist and solid, with attached seat and back cushions.
description_view_0: Side view showing the sofa's straight, padded armrest and the depth of the seat and back cushions.
description_view_1: Front view displaying two large seat and back cushions, straight armrests, and the sofa's symmetrical, boxy form.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, highlighting the uniformity of the armrest and cushion depth.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the continuous, flat backrest and the sofa's overall rectangular shape.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, attached seat cushions and two matching attached backrest cushions, all uniform in size and seamlessly integrated.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, broad, and padded armrests at the same height as the backrest, with a boxy profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, cylindrical legs positioned at the corners, slightly recessed, likely made of wood or metal with a dark finish.
attribute_backrest_type: High, straight, continuous backrest with two attached cushions, no visible segmentation or tufting.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid, smooth upholstery with no visible patterns, stitching, or decorative detailing.
